meaning: adj.[解]神经外膜的,神经外衣的
examples: A soaked medical 8-0 nylon suture was used to perform epineurial repair of rabbit sciatic nerve.
Objective To discuss the curative effects of small gaps bridging and epineurial suture in repairing the rupture of peripheral nerves.
The methods of repairing injured nerves included epineurial neurorrhaphy (7), neurolysis (12), autogenous nerve graft (1), and suture of neuroma (1).
